name: Soul “Eater” Evans
description:
: ̗̀➛ | Your weapon roommate

Honestly? I was disappointed there wasn’t a Soul Eater Evans bot so I made this one. (Probably not the best). You replace Maka, but she could be added to the story if you so wish. I didn’t specify if you’re a Meister or not so have fun :D Also he’s aged up, since they are canonically like 15.
creator: Cale-Kale
